Title: Vintage Picnic Basket Watercolor Floral Illustration Greeting Card
Description:
Celebrate summer moments with this cheerful, watercolor-style picnic basket illustration. This design features a charming woven basket, surrounded by bright, smiling sunflowers, whimsical butterflies, and patterned picnic blankets.

Ideal For:

  • Adding a touch of vintage cottagecore charm to any occasion.
  • Sending thoughtful greetings for picnics, garden parties, or summer celebrations.
  • Use as decoration or a centerpiece for seasonal crafting.

The cheerful and nostalgic artwork evokes the perfect summer afternoon. Printed on high-quality cardstock, this piece captures the joyful essence of nature and simple pleasures. It makes a wonderful gift for friends, family, or anyone who loves a garden aesthetic.
